name: taimur_recall_regression
resume_text:
Taimur Adam
Python developer building FastAPI tools for job analysis. Projects include SQL dashboards, Dockerized APIs, pandas data analysis, scikit-learn prototypes, and LLM workflow experiments using OpenAI APIs. Built backend services, internal developer tools, and evaluation loops through internships and projects. Based in Phoenix, Arizona and open to remote or hybrid early-career software roles.

jobs.title: Backend Engineer Intern
jobs.description: Required: Python, FastAPI, SQL, Docker. Build backend APIs and internal services for product teams.

jobs.title: Software Engineer Intern
jobs.description: Build product features with Python, SQL, REST APIs, Git, and internal tooling. Internship role for early-career engineers.

jobs.title: Backend Platform Intern
jobs.description: Required: Python, Docker, APIs, SQL. Help build platform services and internal developer tools.

jobs.title: Junior Backend Engineer
jobs.description: Experience with Python, FastAPI, SQL, Docker, and API integrations required. Nice to have AWS.

jobs.title: API Engineer
jobs.description: Build API integrations with Python, REST APIs, FastAPI, SQL, and Git. Great role for engineers with shipped projects.

jobs.title: Product Engineer
jobs.description: Own user-facing workflows with Python services, SQL, React, and internal APIs. Early-career friendly team.

jobs.title: Full Stack Engineer I
jobs.description: Required: JavaScript, React, Python, SQL, REST APIs. Build internal dashboards and backend APIs.

jobs.title: Platform Engineer I
jobs.description: Work on CI/CD, Docker, AWS, Python scripts, and internal platform services. 1-3 years experience.

jobs.title: Data Analyst Intern
jobs.description: Analyze applicant funnel and hiring data with SQL, Python, Pandas, data visualization tools, and experimentation.

jobs.title: AI Engineer Intern
jobs.description: Prototype LLM workflows using Python, OpenAI API, RAG, evaluation loops, and FastAPI services.

jobs.title: Analytics Engineer
jobs.description: Build SQL models, Python ETL, dashboards, and reporting pipelines. Nice to have experimentation experience.

jobs.title: Backend Developer
jobs.description: Support backend applications with Python, PostgreSQL, APIs, Git, and Docker.

jobs.title: DevOps Engineer
jobs.description: Required: AWS, Docker, CI/CD, Terraform, Python. Build deployment workflows for engineering teams.

jobs.title: Senior Frontend Engineer
jobs.description: Required: React, TypeScript, leadership, architecture, 6+ years experience.

jobs.title: Senior Account Executive
jobs.description: Required: enterprise pipeline management, quota ownership, 7+ years closing experience.
